name: Integration.app
description: Integration.app — universal SDK for embedded integrations in SaaS products. Pre-built connectors, unified data models, and customer-facing UI.

seo.title: Integration.app — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Integration.app: Integration.app — universal SDK for embedded integrations in SaaS products. Pre-built connectors, unified data models, and customer-facing UI.

when_to_use: Embedding 200+ native integrations into SaaS products via SDK
Unified data model layer across diverse customer tool stacks
Building integration catalogs without custom connector engineering
White-label embedded integrations for product-led SaaS growth
Replacing point-to-point API integrations with one connector SDK

pros: SDK-first with unified data models across apps
Good dev experience for SaaS engineering teams
cons: Newer player versus Merge or Paragon
Unified models can leak when apps diverge
Pricing scales with usage and customers
review.verdict: Strong modern embedded-iPaaS pick; differentiates from Merge with more dev flexibility and UI.
review.best_for: SaaS product teams shipping native customer-facing integrations fast
review.not_for: Internal IT automation or teams needing enterprise iPaaS features
